description:
You are an embedded software engineer for an oceanographic research institute. A recent firmware update has corrupted the telemetry parsing from a fleet of IoT drifting buoys. The firmware codebase is located at /home/ga/workspace/buoy_firmware/. Fix the data-handling bugs so that 'simulate_buoy.py' correctly processes the raw binary and hex logs into JSON telemetry.

This is the most "to-the-point" version. But wait, the instructions say "Preserve any backstory...". The bug types are part of the technical context. I'll keep them.

Final check:
